_comment: Config for the disabled, non-blocking Lighthouse CI stub (see .github/workflows/ci.yml `lighthouse` job). All assertions are 'warn' — advisory only, never a hard gate — because lab timing is variable (software-craft: production-load-testing). Median of 3 runs. Enable the job and tighten thresholds once Vercel Speed Insights shows real-user headroom. /login is used because it renders without an authenticated session.
